mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_QUALIFICATION_APPLY ( QUAL_NO, PERSON_ID, QUAL_NAME, DATE_OBTAINED, QUAL_CARD_NO, QUAL_INSTITUTE, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, VALIDITY_DATE, ACQUISITION_MODES, QUAL_LEVEL, PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N, QUAL_GRADE, QUAL_REMARK, UPDATE_QUAL_NO, APPLY_TYPE, ESS_TYPE_CODE, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME, FILENOSSTR, EARROR, CALLBACK, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{qualNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qualName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{dateObtained, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{qualCardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qualInstitute, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TO_DATE(#{validityDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{acquisitionModes, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qualLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentallowanceYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qualGrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qualRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateQualNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{essTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filenosstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{earror, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callback, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT QUAL_NO, PERSON_ID, QUAL_NAME, TO_CHAR(DATE_OBTAINED,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS DATE_OBTAINED, QUAL_CARD_NO, QUAL_INSTITUTE, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(VALIDITY_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS VALIDITY_DATE, ACQUISITION_MODES, QUAL_LEVEL, PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N, QUAL_GRADE, QUAL_REMARK, UPDATE_QUAL_NO, APPLY_TYPE, ESS_TYPE_CODE, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME, FILENOSSTR, EARROR, CALLBACK FROM HR_QUALIFICATION_APPLY WHERE QUAL_NO = #{qualNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
